params.prompt: Warm handheld documentary style, soft morning kitchen light. Shot 1: Camera holds on a white refrigerator — an August 2026 calendar pinned to the door, dates 1 through 16 crossed out in black marker, the 17 circled in red. Camera drifts slightly, then settles. Shot 2: The boy — dark swept hair, Royal blue polo, khaki pants — stands in the kitchen, shoulders slightly forward, eyes down. Nervous. Shot 3: His mom steps in front of him, both hands smoothing his collar slowly and deliberately. Camera holds close, slight handheld breath. Shot 4: She steps back and looks at him. He pulls his shoulders back and stands straight. She says: You're ready. He believes it. Shot 5: Full body — boy facing camera, Royal blue polo tucked into khaki pants, black shoes. He meets the camera like he means it. Camera holds steady. Shot 6: Tight close-up on his face. Nervousness gone. Just pride. Soft warm light. Shot 7: From behind — mom's hands lift and zip his backpack closed. He holds still, shoulders back, uniform sharp. Shot 8: Front door opens wide to golden morning light. Mom stands at the threshold watching as he steps toward the door. Camera holds on her face. Shot 9: Exterior — boy walks away down a sidewalk, backpack on, Royal blue polo catching the morning light. Camera drifts forward slowly, following but never catching him. Hard cuts throughout. Audio: fabric rustle, collar adjust, zipper pull, footsteps on tile, screen door, footsteps on pavement, morning birds.
